company_core.name: Saviynt
company_core.description: Saviynt offers a cloud-based identity management platform that integrates identity governance, application access governance, and privileged access management to improve security and compliance for enterprises. The platform utilizes advanced technologies to facilitate granular access control, manage identity lifecycles, and implement Zero Trust principles across multi-cloud environments.
investors: Happy Valley LaunchBox powered by PNC Bank

founders.name: Amit Saha
founders.background:
Amit Saha has a diverse background in banking and finance, having served as a Branch Manager at Chhattisgarh Rajya Gramin Bank from 2013 to 2017 and as an Assistant Manager at both INGVYSYA Bank and Yes Bank in 2010-2011. He began his career as a Business Analyst at Knex Inc. from 2017 to 2018. Amit holds a degree from Barkatullah Vishwavidyalaya.

---
Sources: linkedin.com/in/amit-saha-7a259a4

competitors.description: The company offers a data security platform that automates data access governance and management, streamlining processes such as data onboarding, policy creation, and access approvals through integrated workflows. It utilizes technologies for granular access control, continuous monitoring of queries
competitors.tags: Analytics & Business Intelligence Platforms, Life Sciences & Healthcare, Data Infrastructure & Cloud Services, Communications & Information Technology, Healthcare Data & EHR Technology

competitors.description: The company provides a SaaS security platform designed to prevent data breaches by ensuring deep visibility and real-time risk detection across various SaaS applications. It utilizes technologies such as identity and access management, threat detection, and configuration management to address risks
competitors.tags: Security Software & Services, Business (B2B), Cybersecurity, Software, Service

competitors.description: The product is a platform designed for managing identity controls across self-hosted and SaaS applications, focusing on continuous monitoring and compliance. It utilizes advanced AI analytics and modern authentication protocols to assess and improve identity governance and risk management.
competitors.tags: Security Software & Services, Business (B2B), Cybersecurity, Software, Service

# Saviynt | Meeting Brief
*2026-03-03*

## TL;DR
Saviynt offers a cloud-native identity governance and privileged access management platform targeting enterprise security and compliance across multi-cloud environments. The company has raised $1.075B in total funding, with its most recent round closing in February 2026. Headcount and web traffic are both trending upward, signaling active growth momentum.

## Why This Meeting Matters
• Saviynt has raised $1.075B in total funding from institutional investors including KKR, HPS Investment Partners, AllianceBernstein, and PNC — indicating significant capital backing and institutional validation in the enterprise identity security space [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/130270)
• Headcount grew 7.8% over the last 90 days, suggesting active scaling of the team and potential expansion into new markets or product areas [[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/130270)
• Web traffic is up 4.0% over the last 30 days, pointing to growing market interest and pipeline activity [[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/130270)
• A funding event was recorded as recently as February 2, 2026, indicating the company is actively raising or has recently closed capital — a key timing signal for investor engagement [[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/130270)

## Company Snapshot

|---|---|

## Founders
**Amit Saha** — VP Business Development | linkedin.com/in/amit-saha-7a259a4
Amit Saha brings a background spanning banking, finance, and business development, with roles at Chhattisgarh Rajya Gramin Bank, INGVYSYA Bank, Yes Bank, and Knex Inc. He holds a degree from Barkatullah Vishwavidyalaya. Note: the provided data lists only one individual under Founders & Leadership; additional founder or executive data is not available in the source material.

## Key Signals
• [Hiring] Headcount up 7.8% in 90 days — Source: Saviynt Key Signals [[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/130270), current snapshot
• [Web Traffic] Traffic growing 4.0% in 30 days — Source: Saviynt Key Signals [[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/130270), current snapshot
• [Funding] Last funding event recorded February 2, 2026; current stage: Series B — Source: Saviynt Key Signals [[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/130270)

## In the News
No recent news available.

## Meeting Prep
**Key questions to ask:**
• The company is categorized as Series B yet has raised over $1B in total funding — can leadership clarify the capital structure, use of proceeds from the February 2026 round, and how the Series B designation reflects the current stage? [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/130270)[[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/130270)
• Headcount has grown 7.8% in 90 days against a base of 1,516 employees — where is hiring concentrated (sales, engineering, go-to-market), and what does this signal about near-term strategic priorities? [[4]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/130270)
• With KKR and HPS Investment Partners among existing backers, what is the current path to liquidity — is an IPO, strategic acquisition, or continued private growth the preferred outcome? [[2]](https://console.harmonic.ai/companies/130270)

**Recommended next step:** Request a product demo and current ARR/NRR metrics ahead of the meeting to ground valuation discussions, given the significant capital raised relative to the Series B stage designation.
